pageDescription: Calculate your Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE) to determine the total number of calories you burn in a day including activity and exercise

activityLevels.sedentary: Sedentary (little or no exercise, desk job)
activityLevels.veryActive: Extremely Active (very hard exercise, physical job, athlete)

definition.title: Total Daily Energy Expenditure Definition
definition.description: TDEE is the total number of calories you burn in a day including BMR, activity, and exercise

components.title: TDEE Components
components.description: BMR (60-75%), Thermic Effect of Food (10%), Activity & Exercise (15-30%)

usage.title: TDEE Usage
usage.description: TDEE is used to determine maintenance calories and adjust for weight goals

sedentary.title: Sedentary (1.2)
sedentary.description: Little or no exercise, desk job

veryActive.title: Extremely Active (1.9)
veryActive.description: Very hard exercise, physical job, or athlete

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides TDEE estimates only
criticalWarningsList.individual: TDEE varies based on individual factors and actual activity levels

importantNotesList: TDEE is an estimate and may need adjustment based on actual weight changes
Activity levels are often overestimated, so be honest in your assessment
TDEE should be adjusted for weight loss or gain goals
Regular monitoring of weight and energy levels can help fine-tune TDEE estimates

messages.enterInformation: Enter your information to calculate Total Daily Energy Expenditure

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides TDEE estimates based on mathematical formulas. Individual TDEE may vary based on factors not accounted for in these calculations, including actual activity levels, metabolism, and health conditions.

seekHelp.title: Nutritional Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized energy expenditure assessments and nutrition advice, consult healthcare professionals or registered dietitians with expertise in metabolic testing and individual health needs.

errors.heightCm: Please enter valid height in cm

tooltips.activityLevel: Your regular activity level affects TDEE
tooltips.calculationMethod: Different equations may produce slightly different results
